ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer (M/F) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "education_degree" TEXT /* Education degree of the customer */,
  "academic_degree" TEXT /* Academic degree of the customer */,
  "job_years" INTEGER /* Number of years the customer has been in their current job */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the customer */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the customer */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_behavior" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "investor_ind" INTEGER /* Indicator for investing in financial products */,
  "fund_ind" INTEGER /* Indicator for buying funds */,
  "loan_ind" INTEGER /* Indicator for having a loan */,
  "credit_card_ind" INTEGER /* Indicator for having a credit card */,
  "debit_card_ind" INTEGER /* Indicator for having a debit card */,
  "first_agent_date_count" INTEGER /* Number of days since the first agent date */,
  "valid_risk_assessment_ind" INTEGER /* Indicator for a valid risk assessment */,
  "financial_risk_assessment_grade" TEXT /* Financial risk assessment grade */,
  "confirmed_risk_assessment_level" TEXT /* Confirmed risk assessment level */,
  "average_monthly_transaction_amount" REAL /* Average monthly transaction amount */,
  "number_of_transactions_last_year" INTEGER /* Number of transactions in the last year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "total_assets_level" TEXT /* Total assets level of the customer */,
  "potential_assets_level" TEXT /* Potential assets level of the customer */,
  "current_year_monthly_average_agent_amount" TEXT /* Current year's monthly average agent amount */,
  "asset_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the customer's assets */,
  "investment_portfolio_value" REAL /* Value of the customer's investment portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the customer */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., deposit, withdrawal, purchase) */,
  "transaction_category" TEXT /* Category of the transaction (e.g., retail, bill payment, investment) */,
  "transaction_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the transaction was made (e.g., online, ATM, branch) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the customer */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Amount of the loan */,
  "loan_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the loan */,
  "loan_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the loan */,
  "overdue_30d_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the loan has been overdue for 30 days or more */,
  "longest_overdue_day" INTEGER /* Longest number of days the loan has been overdue */,
  "loan_type" TEXT /* Type of the loan (e.g., personal, mortgage, auto) */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the loan */,
  "current_balance" REAL /* Current balance of the loan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_cards" (
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit card */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the customer */,
  "card_grade" TEXT /* Grade of the credit card */,
  "card_activation_ind" INTEGER /* Indicator for card activation */,
  "annual_consumption_amount" TEXT /* Annual consumption amount of the card */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Credit limit of the card */,
  "reward_points" INTEGER /* Reward points accumulated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_cards_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "debit_cards" (
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each debit card */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the customer */,
  "card_grade" TEXT /* Grade of the debit card */,
  "card_activation_ind" INTEGER /* Indicator for card activation */,
  "min_open_date_count" INTEGER /* Number of days since the minimum open date */,
  "account_balance" REAL /* Current balance of the linked account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_debit_cards_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the customer */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the risk assessment */,
  "valid_risk_assessment_ind" INTEGER /* Indicator for a valid risk assessment */,
  "financial_risk_assessment_grade" TEXT /* Financial risk assessment grade */,
  "confirmed_risk_assessment_level" TEXT /* Confirmed risk assessment level */,
  "assessment_details" TEXT /* Detailed results of the risk assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_interests" (
  "interest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product interest */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the customer */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of the product (e.g., financial management, funds, insurance, gold) */,
  "interest_level" INTEGER /* Interest level of the customer in the product */,
  "interest_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the customer's interest in the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_interests_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the customer */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user accessing the CRM system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the CRM system was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the CRM system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user accessing the system (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
